{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Remnant-repelling script
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] can scratch a [[Remnant-repelling script]] into wood.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
